introSection: Jetstream was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Riverview Park in Chicago, Illinois, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in 1964. It closed with the park in 1967. The trains were sold to Sherwood Park in Rockford, Illinois, USA. They were later used on Thunder Road at Carowinds in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA.

fullText:
Jetstream was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Riverview Park in Chicago, Illinois, USA.

The ride opened in 1964. It closed with the park in 1967. The trains were sold to Sherwood Park in Rockford, Illinois, USA. They were later used on Thunder Road at Carowinds in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA.
